title: Intuitive Decision-Making Flow for Data Security
description: A flowchart illustrating the instinctive questions and actions an employee should consider when handling sensitive data to prevent breaches.
relationships: Flows from Start to Identify Data Type
Branches based on data sensitivity (e.g., Public vs. Confidential)
Branches based on recipient trustworthiness (e.g., Internal vs. External)
Leads to Check for Red Flags (e.g., unsolicited request, unusual instructions)
Results in either a Secure Action (e.g., use approved channel, encrypt) or an Insecure Action
Insecure Action leads to a Security Breach outcome
Secure Action leads to a Task Completed Securely outcome
